scope.packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time

excerpts.text: Treat repo-root REGRESSION.md as canonical for task-level regression claims in this repo.
Prefer durable runtime instrumentation over one-off editor guesses; treat editor Python as a bridge, not the final automation substrate.
Regression in this repo uses the human default lane: launch normally, load the default map, and exercise PIE in Selected Viewport on the default pawn path.
Operator lanes, alternate maps, proof views, and automation-only harnesses may support diagnosis, but they do not substitute for regression proof.
A meaningful regression pass must satisfy TP-REG-001, TP-REG-002, and TP-REG-003 in the same run.
Headless diagnostics are supporting proof and do not count as regression by themselves.
The Manual PIE Lane is the default regression surface for this repo.

notes: Prepared from the packet repo on current disk as required by the repo-local context rule.
No substitute docs from the current workspace repo were used.
